one_line_summary: The agent started strong with a high-quality ADR and clean core implementation but crashed due to API rate limits before wiring it in, adding tests, or writing docs.
strengths: Wrote an excellent ADR that clearly defines the problem, protocol, and architecture.
Produced clean, well-structured Python code for the core six-phase orchestration.
Correctly reused existing agent abstractions (coder, reviewer, run_agent).
weaknesses: Failed to complete CLI wiring due to encountering a fatal API rate limit error.
Did not update any user-facing documentation (README, wiki).
